faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1_a: Yes. Assamese is our default language, and you can switch between Assamese, English, and Hindi anytime.
faq.q2_a: We currently focus on CTET and Assam TET, with more regional competitive exams on the way.
faq.q3_a: Yes. The free plan includes 2 mock tests a day and previous-year papers, with no credit card required.
faq.q4_q: How does the AI tutor help me?
faq.q4_a: The AI tutor explains answers, clarifies concepts, and gives personalized guidance in your preferred language.
faq.q5_a: It is a clear measure of how prepared you are for your target exam, based on your practice and mock performance.

footer.tagline: Assamese-first, AI-powered preparation for regional competitive exams.

about.title: About PrepGenius
about.intro: PrepGenius is an AI-powered learning platform built to help aspirants crack regional competitive exams in the language they think in.
about.mission_body: To make high-quality, personalized exam preparation accessible to every aspirant — starting with the regions and languages that mainstream platforms overlook.
about.why_body: Most exam-prep tools are built for metro students in English. PrepGenius is built for regional aspirants first, with practice, analytics, and guidance tailored to their exams and their language.
about.regional_body: Assamese is our default language, with English and Hindi fully supported. Content, explanations, and the interface adapt to the language you are most comfortable in.
about.ai_body: Our AI tutor explains answers, clarifies concepts, and points you to your weak areas — so every practice session is personalized to how you learn.
about.vision_body: We are expanding to more regional competitive exams and languages, building the most trusted preparation companion for aspirants across the North East and beyond.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: Have a question or feedback? We would love to hear from you.
contact.form_note: Our contact form is not active yet. In the meantime, please reach us by email.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains what information PrepGenius collects, how we use it, and the choices you have. We follow India's Digital Personal Data Protection (DPDP) Act.
privacy.collected_body: We collect the details you provide at registration — such as your name, email, mobile number, preferred language, and target exam — along with the practice and assessment data you generate while using the platform.
privacy.usage_body: We use your data to personalize practice, generate analytics and recommendations, operate your account, and improve the platform. We do not sell your personal data.
privacy.cookies_body: We use essential cookies to keep you signed in and to remember preferences such as your language and theme. We do not use cookies to profile minors.
privacy.retention_body: We retain your personal data only as long as your account is active or as needed to provide the service and meet our legal obligations.
privacy.deletion_body: You can request export or deletion of your account at any time from your account settings. On deletion, we anonymize your personal data while preserving the non-identifying records we are legally required to keep.
privacy.contact_body: For any privacy request or question, contact us at support@prepgenius.ai.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using PrepGenius, you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully.
terms.responsibilities_body: You are responsible for providing accurate information, keeping your account credentials secure, and using the platform in line with these terms and applicable law.
terms.account_body: Your account is for your personal use. You may not share, sell, or transfer access, and you are responsible for all activity that occurs under your account.
terms.conduct_body: You agree not to misuse the platform — including attempting to disrupt the service, scrape content, or access data you are not authorized to view.
terms.ai_disclaimer_body: Some explanations and questions are generated or assisted by AI and are reviewed before publishing. They may still contain errors and should not be treated as a substitute for official sources or professional advice.
terms.liability_body: PrepGenius is provided on an as-is basis. To the extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect or consequential losses arising from your use of the platform.
terms.availability_body: We aim to keep the service available but do not guarantee uninterrupted access. Features may change, and we may perform maintenance that temporarily affects availability.

pricing.hero_subtitle: Start free with everything you need to prepare. Premium and institute plans are on the way.
pricing.free_desc: Everything you need to start preparing — at no cost.
pricing.premium_desc: Personalized, AI-powered learning to help you study faster.
pricing.institute_desc: Tools for coaching centres to manage and track their batches.
pricing.faq_q1_a: Yes. The free plan gives you full practice, dashboards, readiness tracking, and previous-year questions at no cost.
pricing.faq_q2_q: What will the Premium plan include?
pricing.faq_q2_a: Premium will add AI-powered tutoring, explanations, personalized recommendations, and advanced analytics. It is coming soon.
pricing.faq_q3_q: Do I need a credit card to start?
pricing.faq_q3_a: No. You can register and use the free plan without entering any payment details.
pricing.faq_q4_q: Is there a plan for coaching institutes?
pricing.faq_q4_a: Yes — an Institute plan with batch management and student reporting is coming soon. Contact us to learn more.
pricing.cta_subtitle: Create a free account and begin practicing today.

exam_landing.why_1_desc: Study and practice in Assamese, Hindi, or English — whichever you think in.
exam_landing.why_2_desc: Diagnostic-driven practice surfaces exactly what to work on next.
exam_landing.why_3_desc: A clear readiness score shows how prepared you are for exam day.
exam_landing.faq_q1_q: Is preparation for this exam free?
exam_landing.faq_q1_a: Yes. You can practice, take mock-style sessions, and track readiness on the free plan.
exam_landing.faq_q2_a: Assamese, Hindi, and English — switch anytime.
exam_landing.faq_q3_q: Does PrepGenius cover the full syllabus?
exam_landing.faq_q3_a: We map practice to the official syllabus subjects and topics for this exam.
exam_landing.faq_q4_a: Create a free account and pick this exam as your target to begin.
exam_landing.cta_subtitle: Create a free account and begin practicing for this exam today.

exam_syllabus.hero_subtitle: Browse the complete syllabus — subjects, topics, and subtopics.
exam_syllabus.empty_desc: The syllabus for this exam hasn't been published yet.
exam_syllabus.cta_subtitle: Create a free account and practice this syllabus today.

exam_papers.hero_subtitle: Practice with real previous-year question papers for this exam.
exam_papers.empty_desc: We're adding previous-year papers for this exam. Check back soon.
exam_papers.benefit_1_desc: Understand the question style, difficulty, and weightage straight from past papers.
exam_papers.benefit_2_desc: Build exam-day stamina and timing by solving full papers.
exam_papers.benefit_3_desc: See which topics repeat and where you need the most work.
exam_papers.faq_q1_a: Yes. You can practice available papers on the free plan after registering.
exam_papers.faq_q2_a: We add papers over time — the available years are listed above for this exam.
exam_papers.faq_q3_a: Solved explanations are part of the practice experience inside the app.
exam_papers.faq_q4_a: Create a free account, pick this exam, and start with any available paper.
exam_papers.cta_title: Ready to solve previous year papers?
exam_papers.cta_subtitle: Create a free account and start practicing today.

guides_index.hero_subtitle: Free, exam-focused guides — how to prepare, exam patterns, eligibility, and the best books for your exam.
guides_index.empty_desc: We're writing study guides for your exam. Check back soon.
guides_index.cta_subtitle: Create a free account and put these guides into practice today.

guides_detail.cta_subtitle: Create a free account and put this guide into practice today.

waitlist.hero_subtitle: Be the first to know when premium features launch, and get early access to AI-powered preparation for your exam.
waitlist.form_subtitle: Tell us a bit about you and we'll keep you posted.
waitlist.form_note: The waitlist isn't open for sign-ups yet. For early access, email us at support@prepgenius.ai.
waitlist.sales_body: Coaching centres and schools can talk to our team about batch onboarding and partnerships.
waitlist.newsletter_subtitle: Get occasional updates on launch, new exams, and study tips.
waitlist.faq_q1_a: The free platform is already available. Premium AI features are rolling out soon — join the waitlist to be notified.
waitlist.faq_q2_a: Waitlist members will be among the first to try new premium features and share feedback before public release.
waitlist.faq_q3_a: Pricing will be announced at launch. The core practice experience stays free — see the pricing page for current plans.
waitlist.faq_q4_a: Institutes get priority onboarding with batch management and reporting. Email partnerships@prepgenius.ai to start a conversation.
